summary: Iteration 55 - Verified Annual Reviews / Bilans Suivis feature. All 9 backend tests passed. UI tests verified: (1) Dashboard shows review alerts widget with correct stats (108 total, 5 next 30 days), (2) Annual Reviews page shows all 108/109 reviews with filters and search, (3) Complete modal shows member summary section (attendance + payments) at top, (4) Email template includes 'Prendre rendez-vous' CTA button.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js lines 408-465: Review alerts widget correctly displays total_scheduled, overdue_count, this_week_count, next_30_count from /api/annual-reviews/dashboard-alerts
AnnualReviewsPage.js lines 632-696: Complete modal shows member summary section with attendance (sessions, avg/week, engagement) and payments (active schedules, monthly amount, status)
annual_reviews.py lines 156-216: member-summary endpoint returns comprehensive attendance and payment data
notifications.py lines 88-92: Email template includes 'Prendre rendez-vous' CTA button with mailto link
seed_data_creation: 1 review was completed during test_complete_review_with_measurements test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55 verified Annual Reviews / Bilans Suivis feature: (1) GET /api/annual-reviews/dashboard-alerts returns total_scheduled=108, overdue_count=0, this_week_count=0, next_30_count=5, (2) GET /api/annual-reviews returns 109 reviews (108 scheduled + 1 completed from test), (3) GET /api/annual-reviews/member-summary/{member_id} returns attendance and payment data, (4) POST /api/annual-reviews/{review_id}/complete successfully completes reviews with measurements and calculates weight_change, (5) Email template has 'Prendre rendez-vous' CTA with mailto:contact@thecoachswitzerland.ch

member_summary_endpoint.details: Returns attendance (total_sessions, avg_per_week, engagement) and payments (active_schedules, monthly_amount, late_count)

auto_generate_endpoint.details: Generates reviews for active members, skips existing scheduled reviews

get_all_reviews.details: Returns all 108+ reviews with member names enriched

complete_review_endpoint.details: Completes review with measurements, calculates weight_change, sets completed_date

dashboard_widget.details: Shows 'Bilans / Suivis' widget with stats: Total planifiés=108, En retard=0, Cette semaine=0, 30 prochains jours=5

reviews_page_list.details: Shows table with all reviews, filters (upcoming, this week, late), search, and type filter

complete_modal_member_summary.details: Modal shows 'Résumé automatique du membre' section at top with attendance (séances, moy/semaine, engagement) and payments (abonnement actif, montant mensuel, statut)

email_cta_button.details: Email template includes 'Prendre rendez-vous' CTA button with mailto:contact@thecoachswitzerland.ch
